requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy-Efficiency Labelling — Refrigerating Appliances (IRAM 2404-3 / IEC 62552)
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标识——制冷器具（IRAM 2404-3 / IEC 62552）
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標識——製冷器具（IRAM 2404-3 / IEC 62552）

summary.en: Argentina operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling regime (etiquetado de eficiencia energetica) for household refrigerating appliances. The label displays an A-to-G efficiency class together with annual energy consumption (kWh/year) and rated volume, and it is issued on the basis of testing and certification by IRAM under the framework set by the Secretaria de Energia / Secretaria de Comercio. The applicable test/label standard is the IRAM 2404 series (notably IRAM 2404-3, household refrigerators and freezers — energy labelling), which adopts the IEC 62552 series (IRAM-IEC 62552) measurement methods. The energy label must be affixed to each unit at point of sale; it is a separate mandatory requirement from the 'S' safety mark. Testing must be performed for 220 V / 50 Hz operating conditions. There is no centralized pre-market product registry analogous to the EU's EPREL — the obligation is to hold the IRAM energy certificate and display the physical label.
summary.zh: 阿根廷对家用制冷器具实行强制能效标识制度（etiquetado de eficiencia energetica）。标签展示A至G能效等级，连同年耗电量（千瓦时/年）及额定容积，并在能源秘书处/商务秘书处设定的框架下，基于IRAM的检测和认证颁发。适用的检测/标识标准为IRAM 2404系列（特别是IRAM 2404-3，家用电冰箱和冷冻箱能效标识），该系列采用IEC 62552系列（IRAM-IEC 62552）测量方法。能效标签须在销售点加贴于每台产品；它是独立于"S"安全标志的强制要求。检测须按220 V/50 Hz运行条件进行。不存在类似欧盟EPREL的集中式市场前产品注册库——义务是持有IRAM能效证书并展示实体标签。
summary.zht: 阿根廷對家用製冷器具實行強制能效標識制度（etiquetado de eficiencia energetica）。標籤展示A至G能效等級，連同年耗電量（千瓦時/年）及額定容積，並在能源秘書處/商務秘書處設定的框架下，基於IRAM的檢測和認證頒發。適用的檢測/標識標準為IRAM 2404系列（特別是IRAM 2404-3，家用電冰箱和冷凍箱能效標識），該系列採用IEC 62552系列（IRAM-IEC 62552）測量方法。能效標籤須在銷售點加貼於每台產品；它是獨立於"S"安全標誌的強制要求。檢測須按220 V/50 Hz運行條件進行。不存在類似歐盟EPREL的集中式市場前產品註冊庫——義務是持有IRAM能效證書並展示實體標籤。

standards_or_laws: IRAM 2404-3 — Household refrigerators and freezers — Energy efficiency labelling (mandatory; adopts IEC 62552 measurement methods)
IRAM-IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (measurement basis for energy labelling)
Secretaria de Energia / Secretaria de Comercio — mandatory energy-efficiency labelling framework for household appliances

summary.en: China's mandatory energy efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), which sets a 1-to-5 grade scale (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption limits, with measurement aligned to the IEC 62552 series via GB/T 8059. It is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR; the China Energy Label (CEL) must be displayed before sale, administered under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR). Both China and Argentina derive measurement methods from IEC 62552, but the rating scales differ (China 1-to-5 vs Argentina A-to-G) and the certificate must be issued in-country: a Chinese CEL grade does not translate into an Argentine energy class without re-testing/certification through IRAM.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级），设定1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量限值，测量通过GB/T 8059与IEC 62552系列对齐。该标准为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）执行；销售前须展示中国能效标识（CEL），依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR）管理。中国和阿根廷的测量方法均源自IEC 62552，但评级体系不同（中国1至5级、阿根廷A至G），且证书须在境内颁发：中国CEL等级未经IRAM重新检测/认证不能转换为阿根廷能效等级。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級），設定1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量限值，測量通過GB/T 8059與IEC 62552系列對齊。該標準為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）執行；銷售前須展示中國能效標識（CEL），依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR）管理。中國和阿根廷的測量方法均源自IEC 62552，但評級體系不同（中國1至5級、阿根廷A至G），且證書須在境內頒發：中國CEL等級未經IRAM重新檢測/認證不能轉換為阿根廷能效等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Three gaps separate Chinese energy compliance from Argentine labelling: (1) In-country certification — the energy label and class must be issued by IRAM following testing in an accepted laboratory; a Chinese CEL grade or CNAS energy test report is not directly accepted. (2) Different scale and thresholds — Argentina uses an A-to-G class derived from IRAM 2404-3; a Chinese Grade 1 or 2 rating does not map to a guaranteed Argentine class without recalculation to the IRAM/IEC 62552 basis under Argentine reference conditions. (3) Physical label and Spanish-language particulars — each unit must bear the Argentine energy label (Spanish text, kWh/year, class, volume) at point of sale. Unlike the EU there is no EPREL-style pre-market database, but the IRAM energy certificate must exist before the labelled product is sold, and it is normally held alongside the safety certificate by the Argentine importer.
gap.zh: 三项差距将中国能效合规与阿根廷标识分开：（1）境内认证——能效标签和等级须由IRAM在认可实验室检测后颁发；中国CEL等级或CNAS能效检测报告不被直接接受。（2）评级体系和门槛不同——阿根廷采用源自IRAM 2404-3的A至G等级；中国1级或2级评定未在阿根廷参考条件下按IRAM/IEC 62552基准重新计算，不能映射为确定的阿根廷等级。（3）实体标签和西班牙语标注——每台产品须在销售点加贴阿根廷能效标签（西班牙语文本、千瓦时/年、等级、容积）。与欧盟不同，不存在EPREL式市场前数据库，但加贴标签的产品销售前须存在IRAM能效证书，且通常与安全证书一并由阿根廷进口商持有。
gap.zht: 三項差距將中國能效合規與阿根廷標識分開：（1）境內認證——能效標籤和等級須由IRAM在認可實驗室檢測後頒發；中國CEL等級或CNAS能效檢測報告不被直接接受。（2）評級體系和門檻不同——阿根廷採用源自IRAM 2404-3的A至G等級；中國1級或2級評定未在阿根廷參考條件下按IRAM/IEC 62552基準重新計算，不能映射為確定的阿根廷等級。（3）實體標籤和西班牙語標注——每台產品須在銷售點加貼阿根廷能效標籤（西班牙語文本、千瓦時/年、等級、容積）。與歐盟不同，不存在EPREL式市場前數據庫，但加貼標籤的產品銷售前須存在IRAM能效證書，且通常與安全證書一併由阿根廷進口商持有。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — energy-efficiency label (A-to-G class) issued via IRAM under IRAM 2404-3 / IRAM-IEC 62552 required before sale; separate from the 'S' safety mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A mandatory IRAM-issued energy-efficiency label (A-to-G) tested to IRAM 2404-3 / IRAM-IEC 62552 is required before household refrigerators are sold in Argentina. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades and the China Energy Label do not satisfy this obligation — in-country testing/certification through IRAM and a physical Spanish-language label are required. There is no EPREL-style pre-market registry, but the IRAM energy certificate must exist before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在阿根廷销售家用电冰箱前，须取得按IRAM 2404-3/IRAM-IEC 62552检测、由IRAM颁发的强制能效标签（A至G）。中国GB 12021.2等级和中国能效标识不满足该义务——须通过IRAM进行境内检测/认证并加贴西班牙语实体标签。不存在EPREL式市场前注册库，但销售前须存在IRAM能效证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在阿根廷銷售家用電冰箱前，須取得按IRAM 2404-3/IRAM-IEC 62552檢測、由IRAM頒發的強制能效標籤（A至G）。中國GB 12021.2等級和中國能效標識不滿足該義務——須通過IRAM進行境內檢測/認證並加貼西班牙語實體標籤。不存在EPREL式市場前註冊庫，但銷售前須存在IRAM能效證書。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Test Conditions & Minimum Efficiency — 220 V / 50 Hz Reference (IRAM-IEC 62552)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效检测条件与最低能效——220 V / 50 Hz参考（IRAM-IEC 62552）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效檢測條件與最低能效——220 V / 50 Hz參考（IRAM-IEC 62552）

summary.en: Argentine energy-efficiency testing of household refrigerating appliances under IRAM-IEC 62552 must be conducted at the local rated supply of 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase, which determines compressor duty cycle and therefore the measured annual energy consumption and resulting A-to-G class. Beyond labelling, the Argentine regime sets minimum energy-efficiency requirements: appliances below the permitted efficiency floor cannot be certified or sold, with the floor tightened over successive resolution updates by the Secretaria de Energia. Manufacturers must declare annual consumption (kWh/year), climate/ambient test class, and rated volumes consistent with the IRAM-IEC 62552 measurement. Because Argentina's 220 V / 50 Hz matches China's single-phase nominal supply and frequency (China three-phase supply is 380 V), compressor and control electronics generally need no frequency redesign; however the energy result must still be re-measured under Argentine reference conditions and certified by IRAM rather than carried over from a Chinese GB 12021.2 test.
summary.zh: 阿根廷依据IRAM-IEC 62552对家用制冷器具进行的能效检测须在本地额定供电220 V/50 Hz单相下进行，该条件决定压缩机工作循环，从而决定测得的年耗电量及相应A至G等级。除标识外，阿根廷制度还设定最低能效要求：低于许可能效下限的器具不能被认证或销售，该下限随能源秘书处历次决议更新而收紧。制造商须声明年耗电量（千瓦时/年）、气候/环境检测等级及与IRAM-IEC 62552测量一致的额定容积。由于阿根廷220 V/50 Hz与中国单相标称供电和频率吻合（中国三相供电为380 V），压缩机和控制电子设备通常无需频率改造；但能效结果仍须在阿根廷参考条件下重新测量并由IRAM认证，而非沿用中国GB 12021.2检测结果。
summary.zht: 阿根廷依據IRAM-IEC 62552對家用製冷器具進行的能效檢測須在本地額定供電220 V/50 Hz單相下進行，該條件決定壓縮機工作循環，從而決定測得的年耗電量及相應A至G等級。除標識外，阿根廷制度還設定最低能效要求：低於許可能效下限的器具不能被認證或銷售，該下限隨能源秘書處歷次決議更新而收緊。製造商須聲明年耗電量（千瓦時/年）、氣候/環境檢測等級及與IRAM-IEC 62552測量一致的額定容積。由於阿根廷220 V/50 Hz與中國單相標稱供電和頻率吻合（中國三相供電為380 V），壓縮機和控制電子設備通常無需頻率改造；但能效結果仍須在阿根廷參考條件下重新測量並由IRAM認證，而非沿用中國GB 12021.2檢測結果。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (energy measurement at 220 V / 50 Hz reference conditions)
IRAM 2404-3 — Energy efficiency labelling for household refrigerators and freezers (minimum efficiency class and declared parameters)
Secretaria de Energia (Argentina) — minimum energy-efficiency requirement resolutions for refrigerating appliances

summary.en: China sets minimum energy efficiency values and grades for household refrigerators in GB 12021.2-2015, with measurement methods in GB/T 8059-2016 aligned to the IEC 62552 series. Chinese tests are conducted at the domestic single-phase nominal supply (220 V / 50 Hz), the same frequency as Argentina; China's three-phase supply is 380 V but household refrigerators run on single-phase. Although the supply conditions are closely comparable, the GB 12021.2 grade boundaries and the China Energy Label result are issued under the Chinese system and are not interchangeable with the Argentine A-to-G class — the appliance must be re-measured and re-certified to IRAM-IEC 62552 to obtain an Argentine energy class.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 12021.2-2015中规定家用电冰箱的最低能效值及等级，测量方法见GB/T 8059-2016，与IEC 62552系列对齐。中国检测在国内单相标称供电（220 V/50 Hz）下进行，频率与阿根廷相同；中国三相供电为380 V，但家用电冰箱采用单相运行。尽管供电条件高度可比，GB 12021.2等级边界和中国能效标识结果在中国制度下颁发，与阿根廷A至G等级不可互换——器具须按IRAM-IEC 62552重新测量和重新认证方可取得阿根廷能效等级。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 12021.2-2015中規定家用電冰箱的最低能效值及等級，測量方法見GB/T 8059-2016，與IEC 62552系列對齊。中國檢測在國內單相標稱供電（220 V/50 Hz）下進行，頻率與阿根廷相同；中國三相供電為380 V，但家用電冰箱採用單相運行。儘管供電條件高度可比，GB 12021.2等級邊界和中國能效標識結果在中國制度下頒發，與阿根廷A至G等級不可互換——器具須按IRAM-IEC 62552重新測量和重新認證方可取得阿根廷能效等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances — test methods (aligned with IEC 62552)

gap.en: The supply conditions align well — both Argentina and China test at 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase, so unlike markets requiring 60 Hz or 110 V redesign, the compressor and electronics generally transfer without frequency changes. The real gaps are procedural and threshold-based: (1) the energy result must be re-measured under Argentine reference/ambient conditions and certified by IRAM, not carried over from a GB 12021.2 report; (2) the appliance must meet the Argentine minimum-efficiency floor in force at certification time, which the Secretaria de Energia periodically raises — a model meeting only a marginal Chinese grade may fall below the Argentine floor; (3) declared parameters (kWh/year, volumes, climate class) on the Argentine label must follow IRAM-IEC 62552 definitions. Where a model already tests well on IEC 62552 for the EU or China, the underlying data may streamline IRAM certification but cannot replace it.
gap.zh: 供电条件高度一致——阿根廷和中国均在220 V/50 Hz单相下检测，故与需要60 Hz或110 V改造的市场不同，压缩机和电子设备通常无需频率改动即可转用。真正的差距是程序性和门槛性的：（1）能效结果须在阿根廷参考/环境条件下重新测量并由IRAM认证，而非沿用GB 12021.2报告；（2）器具须满足认证时生效的阿根廷最低能效下限，该下限由能源秘书处定期提高——仅满足中国边际等级的型号可能低于阿根廷下限；（3）阿根廷标签上声明的参数（千瓦时/年、容积、气候等级）须遵循IRAM-IEC 62552定义。若某型号已按IEC 62552在欧盟或中国测得良好结果，其底层数据可简化IRAM认证，但不能替代之。
gap.zht: 供電條件高度一致——阿根廷和中國均在220 V/50 Hz單相下檢測，故與需要60 Hz或110 V改造的市場不同，壓縮機和電子設備通常無需頻率改動即可轉用。真正的差距是程序性和門檻性的：（1）能效結果須在阿根廷參考/環境條件下重新測量並由IRAM認證，而非沿用GB 12021.2報告；（2）器具須滿足認證時生效的阿根廷最低能效下限，該下限由能源秘書處定期提高——僅滿足中國邊際等級的型號可能低於阿根廷下限；（3）阿根廷標籤上聲明的參數（千瓦時/年、容積、氣候等級）須遵循IRAM-IEC 62552定義。若某型號已按IEC 62552在歐盟或中國測得良好結果，其底層數據可簡化IRAM認證，但不能替代之。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — testing at 220 V / 50 Hz reference conditions and meeting the in-force minimum efficiency floor under IRAM-IEC 62552 / IRAM 2404-3 required for IRAM energy certification and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — minimum energy efficiency values under GB 12021.2-2015 required before sale; tested at 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentine energy testing at 220 V / 50 Hz aligns with Chinese single-phase supply, so no frequency redesign is usually needed; but the energy result must be re-measured under Argentine reference conditions, meet the in-force minimum-efficiency floor, and be certified by IRAM. A Chinese GB 12021.2 grade does not transfer to an Argentine A-to-G class without IRAM certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷220 V/50 Hz能效检测与中国单相供电一致，故通常无需频率改造；但能效结果须在阿根廷参考条件下重新测量、满足生效的最低能效下限，并由IRAM认证。中国GB 12021.2等级未经IRAM认证不能转换为阿根廷A至G等级。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷220 V/50 Hz能效檢測與中國單相供電一致，故通常無需頻率改造；但能效結果須在阿根廷參考條件下重新測量、滿足生效的最低能效下限，並由IRAM認證。中國GB 12021.2等級未經IRAM認證不能轉換為阿根廷A至G等級。
